basics.name: Olivia Muehlberg
basics.label: MS Business Analytics | Hockey Data Analyst
basics.summary: I build predictive models and data products that turn complex sports data into actionable decisions. My work combines analytics, research, and visualization to support recruiting strategy, player evaluation, and business insights.

projects.name: Bentley Hockey Projection Dashboard
projects.description: Built an interactive application that translates junior hockey performance into projected NCAA outcomes for recruiting and roster decisions.
highlights: Built freshman and career projection models
Delivered decision-support tools for Division I coaching staff

projects.name: NHL Concussion Analytics Research
projects.description: Undergraduate research project examining the impact of concussions on NHL player value and career outcomes.
highlights: Found approximately two-year reduction in career length
Developed business recommendations for contract strategy

projects.name: OHL Expansion Market Analysis
projects.description: Market expansion analysis evaluating potential locations using demographic and hockey market data.
